name: Courtallam waterfall cluster
note: Tenkasi district officially highlights Main Falls, Old Falls, Five Falls, Shenbagadevi Falls, Honey Falls, Tiger Falls, Chitraruvi, Fruit Garden Falls and Palaruvi as major waterfall attractions.

name: Official district tourism catalogue
note: The district tourism site explicitly features Courtallam, Thirumalaikumaraswamy Temple Panpozhi, Kutraalanatha Swamy Temple and Sankaranarayanar Temple among tourism entries.

name: District home-page spotlight
note: The district front page spotlights Pottalpudur Dargah, Adavinainar Dam, Gundaru Dam, Shenbagadevi Falls and Chithirai Sabha as featured tourism visuals.

name: District dams page
note: The district dams page identifies Adavinainar Dam & Park, Gundar Reservoir and Falls, and Gadananathi Dam & Park as visitor-facing scenic sites.

name: Tripadvisor Tenkasi attraction ranking
note: Recent TripAdvisor Tenkasi attraction rankings highlight Thirumalai Kovil and Sri Tenkasi Kasi Viswanathar Temple, confirming active traveler engagement.

name: Tripadvisor Courtallam review context
note: Traveler reviews identify Main Falls, Five Falls, Old Courtallam, Tiger Falls and Chitraruvi as the most accessible waterfall experiences, while Shenbagadevi and Honey Falls act as deeper trail-based sites.
